text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is literally shaking with excitement.
It's clear she can't wait to show everyone how
much she's improved.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She promises to exceed my expectations for her
on the track, and with those encouraging words,
she sets off for her big race.
